label: spheroid
description: volume formed by rotating an ellipse around one of its axes; special case of ellipsoid

label: logarithmic derivative
description: ratio of a function's derivative to the function; d(ln|f(x)|)/dx

label: sectional curvature
description: scalar quantity; given two unit tangent vectors u, v at the same point, defined as K(u,v) = ⟨R(u,v)v,u⟩/(1-⟨u,v⟩²), where R is the Riemann curvature

label: power of a point
description: relative distance of a point from a circle

label: offset
description: integer indicating the distance (displacement) between the beginning of an array or data structure and a given element or point

label: cross entropy
description: in information theory, given two probability distributions, the average number of bits needed to identify an event if the coding scheme is optimized for the ‘wrong’ probability distribution rather than the true distribution

label: ordinal indicator
description: typographical character

label: correlation function
description: matrix element computed by inserting a product of operators between two states in quantum field theory

label: Mironenko reflecting function
description: mathematical function

label: Bell triangle
description: triangle of numbers analogous to Pascal's triangle

label: gunk
description: in mereology, whole whose parts all have further proper parts

label: mutual knowledge
description: a statement that all agents know, without necessarily knowing whether other agents know

label: real element
description: an element of a group that belongs to the same conjugacy class as its inverse

label: mutual knowledge
description: in game theory, a statement that players know, without necessarily knowing whether other players know

label: tri-axial ellipsoid
description: ellipsoid where each axis has a different length

label: symplectic map
description: a broader concept than an area-preserving map

label: parking function
description: generalization of permutations

label: Focal loss
description: loss function

label: coordinate frame
description: mathematical concept

label: Dunkley-Fisher Operator
description: Linear operator K = G + iJ that decomposes a single probability current into a symmetric Fisher-dissipative part and a metric-skew reversible part in universal information hydrodynamics

label: UIH generator
description: Real generator K decomposed into a symmetric Fisher operator G and an antisymmetric operator J, composing reversible and irreversible dynamics across Markov, Fokker-Planck, GKLS, scalar gravity and RG blocks.

label: Fisher mobility operator
description: Symmetric operator generating Fisher gradient flow and forming the irreversible part of the UIH generator K = G + iJ
